title: Here is Why Growth Investors Should Buy Vistra Corp. (VST) Now
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) possesses solid growth attributes, which could help it handily outperform the market.

title: Vistra: All-Time Highs In Texas Heat And Vistra's Stock Price
text: Texas-based power producer Vistra Corp. is well-positioned to benefit from the state's shift towards renewable energy and battery storage, due to its expertise as a renewables developer. Texas' grid has held up well this summer amid record heat, thanks in part to recent additions of renewable energy generation capacity, reducing the risk of disruptions for Vistra. Vistra's green energy portfolio is growing rapidly, with most of its solar and battery storage projects expected to come online between 2024 and 2026, tripling its current size.

title: Here's Why You Should Add Vistra (VST) to Your Portfolio Now
text: Vistra (VST) makes a strong case for investment, given its growth prospects, strong return on equity and ability to increase shareholders' value.

title: Here's Why Momentum in Vistra Corp. (VST) Should Keep going
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) could be a solid choice for shorter-term investors looking to capitalize on the recent price trend in fundamentally sound stocks. It is one of the many stocks that passed through our shorter-term trading strategy-based screen.

title: Vistra to Report Second Quarter Results on Aug. 9, 2023
text: IRVING, Texas , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its second quarter 2023 financial and operating results on Wednesday, Aug. 9, 2023.  Management will present the materials during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 9 a.m.
